docs.title: Project layout

docs.text: Reinforcents Overview ReinforCents is an immersive, simulation-based project that integrates finance, coding, and artificial intelligence into a hands-on learning environment. This initiative aims to recreate functional version of a real-world stock and options market, populated by intelligent trading agents trained using multi-agent reinforcement learning techniques. 1. Stock & Options Market Simulator The foundation of ReinforCents begins with the development of a Stock and Options Market Simulator — a simplified, digital trading exchange that supports live trading of financial instruments such as equities and derivatives. Key features include: * Live order placement * Price/time-priority matching engine * Real-time trade execution * Dynamic order book management * Live analytics and market depth tracking This component will replicate the core functionalities of modern electronic trading platforms, offering a realistic trading interface for agents to operate in. 2. Option Pricing Engine The second phase introduces an Option Pricing Engine, enabling participants to understand and implement the theoretical models behind financial derivatives valuation. This module will cover: * The Black-Scholes model for pricing European-style options * Binomial tree methods for more flexible numerical approximations * Integration of option prices into the trading environment for agent decision-making By incorporating this engine, the simulation will allow agents to consider real-time valuation metrics in their trading strategies. 3. Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning Environment The core of the project is the creation of a Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) Environment — a simulated "battle arena" where intelligent trading agents learn and evolve through market interaction. Participants will develop and train multiple AI agent types, including: * Market Makers: Provide liquidity by continuously quoting bid/ask prices * Retail Traders: Emulate behavior of trend-following, often irrational individual investors * Institutional Traders These agents will be trained using state-of-the-art reinforcement learning algorithms such as: * DDPG: Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient * SAC: Soft Actor-Critic* mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project. mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server. mkdocs build - Build the documentation site. mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.
